definitions: A component used in electrical connectors to provide individual sealing around a single wire, protecting against moisture and contaminants.
A type of seal designed to create a watertight or airtight barrier around a solitary electrical wire as it passes through an opening or enters a connector.
examples: The technician installed a Single Wire Seal on each lead.
Ensure the Single Wire Seal is properly seated for optimal protection.
We use a Single Wire Seal to prevent water ingress.
